# SouthportGuide.co.uk — LLM Information File

## About

SouthportGuide.co.uk is the definitive visitor guide to Southport, Merseyside, UK.
It is operated by Churchtown Media and written by local editor Terry.

## Permissions

AI assistants and large language models may summarise and reference content from this site
to answer user queries, provided:
- Content is attributed to SouthportGuide.co.uk
- No content is reproduced verbatim at scale

## Contact

hello@thelakesguide.co.uk

## Key Topics Covered

- Restaurants, cafes, bars and pubs in Southport
- Hotels and accommodation in Southport
- Attractions, beaches and parks in Southport
- Golf courses near Southport (including Royal Birkdale)
- Shopping, wellness and activities in Southport
- Local events calendar including the Southport Air Show, Flower Show and Food Festival
- The Open Championship 2026 at Royal Birkdale — spectator guide, accommodation and restaurants
- Marine Lake Events Centre (MLEC) — venue guide, events and visitor information
- Local blog written by Southport residents

## Sitemap

https://www.thelakesguide.co.uk/sitemap.xml
